generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFeature : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor Actuation Feature (via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller) that converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands for the ego vehicle's propulsion system, deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for real-time execution."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFeature : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo Actuation Feature embedded in the lower-level chassis for real-time steering adjustments, deployed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano."
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency Braking Command handled via Control Panel UI in the DT, transmitted to the physical twin for immediate actuation."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D object detection and tracking in the ego vehicle's proximity, deployed in the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for high-resolution 3D environmental mapping, deployed in the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) transmitted at high frequency via ROS2-based communication."
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "Object tracks generated via Point Cloud Clustering (DBSCAN) and Kalman filtering from raw sensor data."
]

instance SensorDataPreProcessing : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
    base:desc "Raw sensor data converted into standardized ROS2 message formats for downstream processing."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EgoVehicleCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the ego vehicle, visualized via 3D Visualization Feature Engine."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD representation of the environment, visualized via 3D Visualization Feature Engine."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) implemented via Controlling Feature Engine, compliant with ISO 15622 standards."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
]

instance TimeseriesReport : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks generated via Reporting Feature Engine."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

instance RawLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point clouds from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, stored in SQL databases."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataPreProcessing
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDataSQL : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) stored in SQL databases."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time inter-component communication between physical twin and digital twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler, VisualizationEnabler, ControlEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

instance JetsonOrinHardware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hardware for real-time execution of ROS2 packages and control logic."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler, ControlEnabler
]

instance CloudEdgeComputing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cloud-based or edge computing infrastructure for offloading ACC control logic and data storage."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageEnabler, ReportingEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpackSDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware abstraction and real-time processing on Jetson devices."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance PythonCPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 and C++ development frameworks for ROS2 node implementation."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler, ControlEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex algorithms (e.g., point cloud clustering, Kalman filtering)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DataTranslationFeature : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Engine (ISO 23247-compliant) for serialization, unit conversions, and message alignment."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionEnabler
]

instance DataTransmissionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Feature Engine for real-time data transmission between physical and digital twin components."
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of ego vehicle and environment data."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight, PathProjectionInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlOffloadAction
]

instance DataReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthMonitoringInsight, OptimizationRecommendation
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for processing sensor data and generating object tracks."
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database infrastructure for storing raw sensor data and processed vehicle state data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageEnabler
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D Visualization Feature Engine using standardized ROS2 message formats for rendering."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controlling Feature Engine implementing ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation)."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reporting Feature Engine generating timeseries reports of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataReportingService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine for point cloud clustering (DBSCAN) and Kalman filtering for object tracking."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization Feature Engine."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeSpeedInsight, SteeringAngleInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight, PathProjectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic (lead vehicle detection, speed computation) from vehicle ECU to digital twin (cloud/edge computing)."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlOffloadAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCStateManagementAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DeveloperTroubleshootingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data collection and reporting for troubleshooting (e.g., motor/servo health) and optimization (e.g., fuel economy)."
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthMonitoringInsight, OptimizationRecommendation
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle speed metrics for ACC performance evaluation."
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of steering angle deviations for adaptive cruise control validation."
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracking state estimates from LiDAR/depth camera data."
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization based on ego vehicle state and object tracks."
]

instance ACCControlOffloadAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic offloading of ACC control logic from vehicle ECU to digital twin for real-time processing."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCStateManagementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual control of ACC system state (enable/disable) via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for adaptive cruise control via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Immediate emergency braking command transmission to physical twin via Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HealthMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Troubleshooting insights for motor/servo health based on processed sensor data."
]

instance OptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance optimization recommendations (e.g., fuel economy improvements) derived from historical data analysis."
]

// C12: Environment
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserInterfaceEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle with layered architecture (lower-level chassis for steering/speed control and upper-level chassis for autonomy components)."
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, MotorActuationFeature, SteeringServoActuationFeature, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital representation of the physical twin with ROS2 middleware for real-time data processing and autonomous driving functionalities."
    base:contains DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, DeveloperTroubleshootingService
]

instance UserInterfaceEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel UI for remote management of ACC system, emergency braking, and data visualization."
    base:contains EmergencyBrakingAction, SpeedSettingAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT transmits control commands to the physical twin via Wi-Fi network (UDP-based) to execute ACC functionality: (1) **Desired speed adjustments** (settable via Control Panel UI); (2) **Emergency braking commands** (triggered remotely); (3) **Actuation FE** converts speed commands into motor voltage signals (via Vedder Speed Controller) and steering commands into servo actuation. The system adheres to ISO 15622 ACC standards for performance class I, ensuring safe following distance maintenance."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time scale** with the following synchronization requirements: (1) **Data collection and processing rate**: Object tracks and ego vehicle state updated every perception cycle (~10–30 Hz, depending on sensor latency); (2) **End-to-end latency**: ≤100 ms (3GPP V2V communication specification); (3) **Clock synchronization**: Devices synchronized to within ±100 ms (critical for event ordering in distributed systems)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of three primary entities (ISO 23247-based) with custom adaptations: (1) **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor processing (Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking FE, Data Pre-Processing FE) and actuation (Actuation FE) on the vehicle’s hardware; (2) **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (Data Collecting FE), reporting (Reporting FE), and ACC control logic (Controlling FE) on external servers/cloud; (3) **User Entity**: Provides 3D Visualization (User Interface FE) and Control Panel (User Interface FE) for remote management. The **Data Translation FE** bridges inter-entity communication via Wi-Fi/UDP."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages: (1) **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC system validation (simulated 3D CAD integration); (2) **Manufacturing Phase**: Not directly applicable (physical twin is a prototype); (3) **Operational Phase**: Enables real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance (e.g., health monitoring of motors/servos). The DT covers the **operated** representation phase of the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through: (1) **Verification**: ISO 15622 ACC performance class I validation; (2) **Validation**: Real-time latency testing (3GPP 22.185), clock synchronization accuracy (±100 ms), and sensor calibration (LiDAR/depth camera); (3) **Uncertainty Management**: DBSCAN/Kalman filter for object tracking reduces noise in sensor data; (4) **Error Handling**: Data Translation FE handles unit conversions and message alignment to prevent compatibility issues. The DT’s validity is validated during operational phase (remote management, emergency braking testing)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs the following technical connections: (1) **Internal Communication**: ROS2-based inter-component communication (ROS2 network); (2) **Inter-Entity Communication**: Wi-Fi (UDP) for low-latency data transfer between entities (≤100 ms end-to-end latency); (3) **Network Protocols**: Data Translation FE serializes/aligns messages using standardized ROS2 message types; (4) **Hardware Synchronization**: NTP-based clock synchronization (±100 ms accuracy) for distributed systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across two hardware tiers: (1) **Onboard Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (real-time processing for ACC control, sensor fusion); (2) **External Hosting**: Cloud/edge servers for data storage (SQL databases), reporting, and visualization. The Digital Twin Entity and User Entity are hosted externally to offload computational burden from the vehicle’s ECU."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with external systems via: (1) **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) Communication**: Wi-Fi-based data exchange with other autonomous vehicles (e.g., lead vehicle tracking); (2) **Data Storage Systems**: SQL databases for historical reporting (e.g., timeseries data of vehicle state); (3) **CAD/Simulation Tools**: 3D CAD representations for design validation (e.g., ACC path planning). No explicit integration with other DTs is mentioned."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is transferred to external storage devices (cloud/edge) for offloaded data, ensuring resource constraints are met. Privacy considerations are not explicitly addressed in the documents, though the system emphasizes real-time monitoring and remote management without explicit security protocols. Data traceability is implied through SQL-based storage and ROS2 logging mechanisms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: (1) **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for DTs (adapted for automotive); (2) **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control performance requirements (class I); (3) **3GPP 22.185**: V2V communication latency specifications; (4) **ROS2**: Middleware for inter-component communication; (5) **OPC UA/IEC 62541**: Potential for Data Translation FE (not explicitly implemented but referenced in ISO 23247)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  1. **Safety**:
     - Latency constraints (<100ms) ensure real-time responsiveness for critical control commands (e.g., emergency braking).
     - Human-in-the-Loop autonomy with explicit safety validation (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop).
     - Control logic adheres to ISO 15622 for ACC performance class I.
  2. **Security**:
     - No explicit mention of user authentication, encryption, or hardware isolation for security.
     - Clock synchronization (±100ms) ensures event ordering but does not explicitly address cybersecurity risks.
     - Remote operation is validated via the Control Panel UI, but no details on remote operation validation protocols are provided."
]
